prefabCatalog.notes: Layered brass and dark iron torso armor plate cluster with rivet fields, soot streaks, asymmetric repairs, and readable FPS-distance panel breaks.
Goggled furnace-eye head module with brass lens collars, amber glass, vertical jaw grille, cheek rivets, and hose ports.
Offset flywheel shoulder rig with iron carrier bracket, brass gear teeth, heavy hub, and piston anchor sockets.
Black iron forearm with dual exposed pistons, brass cuffs, copper oiler tubes, rubber return hose, and tool wrist socket.
Threat-forward wrist attachment with heat-scarred saw blade, three hooked claw tines, brass guard cage, and oiled bearing hub.
Oversized chest pressure gauge with brass bezel, ivory face, red needle, glass cap, tick geometry, and copper feeder lines.
Braided black rubber hose and copper cable bundle with brass clamps, ribbed sleeves, oil stains, and modular endpoints.
Knee/hip armor stack with angled brass plates, iron pivot drums, piston protectors, rivets, and mud-dark oil buildup.
Assembled upper-body concept showing how Set 12 detail modules upgrade the mechanical sentinel with a thicker threat silhouette and richer material breakup.
Simple palette board for reviewing generated brass, iron, copper, amber glass, hose rubber, saw metal, gauge enamel, and soot materials.
